name: mcp-server-neo4j-cypher
description: Manage Cypher graph queries between LLMs and Neo4j with natural language queries.

rating.reason: Mixed quality documentation. The get_neo4j_schema tool has excellent documentation with comprehensive description, usage guidance, and detailed parameter explanation. However, read_neo4j_cypher and write_neo4j_cypher have minimal descriptions that barely explain their purpose beyond the obvious, and their parameter descriptions are too generic. The inconsistency and the fact that 2/3 tools lack adequate context brings the overall grade to adequate level.
